cyberuni/cyberplace.summary: Opinionated agent behavior and skill-authoring workflows for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and similar agents.
cyberuni/cyberplace.why_recommended: Good defaults for small focused skill repos and disciplined skill authoring.

highlights.summary: Create or improve AGENTS.md and carry forward local skill augmentation guidance.
highlights.why_recommended: Useful when a repo needs agent-facing documentation with minimal drift.
